channel.title: Blog on Oshean Lee Garonita | Mapper | Environmental Planner
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Oshean Lee Garonita | Mapper | Environmental Planner

item.title: Why We Need to Choose The Earth
item.description: Second Entry How It Started Let me start with a bit of a personal story. I was never a nature-lover, and I always took it for granted. Growing up, I’ve always assumed that the trees will always be there and that it never really gave too much significance since it was not moving, or that it does not have the same morphological features as other living things. Sure, we were taught that trees are important.

item.title: On Physical Framework and Land Use Plans: Let's Bridge the Gap!
item.description: First Entry Plans are powerful We make plans for things that we want to achieve. It could be listing down our to-do list for the day, or writing grocery list, or even just a simple reminder could be a plan. Plans give us a sense of purpose as to what we want to do in the future. But let us try scaling it up. Have you ever wondered how our houses were made?
